segments.text: Why is oldmog bottle bumpy and rough?
While every other premium bottle is
smooth, most people think it is just
cheap design. But this texture is
actually a brilliant engineering hack
that saved millions for the company.
See, originally this rum was supplied to
the Indian army. And when you're
drinking this in rough conditions, your
hands wet and slippery. What will happen
with a smooth glass bottle? It will slip
and shatter. So they added this texture
just like a tire grips the road. This
pattern grips your hand so that you
don't drop the bottle. But this is just
a small reason. When thousands of smooth
glass bottle traveled in trucks on bad
roads, they vibrate, hit each other and
sometimes shatter. But this texture acts
as a shield acting like a shock
absorber. Genius.
